title: Fix binary guidelines required sections missing 'Conditions for No'
description:
## Problem
`get_required_sections` for binary classifier guidelines omits `Conditions for No`, which causes validation mismatches for correct Yes/No guidelines.

## Expected Behavior
Binary required sections include both `Definition of No` and `Conditions for No`.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `get_required_sections` for binary returns `Conditions for No`.
- Validation output reports missing sections correctly for binary docs.
- Automated tests cover this requirement.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Implemented fix and regression coverage.

- Updated `get_required_sections` for binary classifiers to require `Conditions for No`.
- Added test assertion that valid binary guidelines no longer classify `Conditions for No` as unknown.
- Added regression test: missing only `Conditions for No` now yields `is_valid=false` with that section in `missing_sections`.
- Verification: `pytest -q MCP/tools/score/guidelines_test.py` -> 4 passed.
